tasks.label: Dev
tasks.detail: Start infra (postgres, kubo, cluster) then run the web + api dev servers
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --wait postgres kubo cluster && pnpm dev

tasks.label: Infra: Up
tasks.detail: Start postgres, kubo and the IPFS cluster in Docker (waits for health)
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --wait postgres kubo cluster

tasks.label: Infra: Down
tasks.detail: Stop all Docker services (data volumes persist)

tasks.label: Infra: Logs
tasks.detail: Tail logs from the infra containers
tasks.command: docker compose logs -f postgres kubo cluster

tasks.label: Follower: Up
tasks.detail: Start a sample participant follower (Kubo + ipfs-cluster-follow emulation)

tasks.label: DB: Migrate
tasks.detail: Apply Drizzle migrations to the local database

tasks.label: DB: Generate migration
tasks.detail: Generate a new Drizzle migration from the schema

tasks.label: Stack: Full (Docker)
tasks.detail: Build and run the entire stack in Docker (infra + api + web)

tasks.label: Test
tasks.detail: Run the test suite across the workspace
